name: leanquill
description: LeanPub-style authoring assistant for VS Code with strict manuscript safety boundaries.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Welcome to LeanQuill — your LeanPub-style authoring assistant.

LeanQuill keeps your manuscript safe with strict write boundaries while helping you organize chapters, track characters, and manage your writing project.

[Initialize Repository](command:leanquill.initialize)

Open a workspace containing your manuscript folder or Book.txt to get started.

Welcome to LeanQuill — your LeanPub-style authoring assistant.

LeanQuill keeps your manuscript safe with strict write boundaries while helping you organize chapters, track characters, and manage your writing project.

[Initialize Repository](command:leanquill.initialize)

Manuscript markers detected — initialize to start managing your project with LeanQuill.

Welcome to LeanQuill — your LeanPub-style authoring assistant.

LeanQuill keeps your manuscript safe with strict write boundaries while helping you organize chapters, track characters, and manage your writing project.

This project is initialized and ready to use.
